a.reason: Broad FWHM (58.3nm) - acceptable but not optimal

b.reason: Wide FWHM (61.0nm) - poor sensor contact or degradation

c.reason: Wide FWHM (66.7nm) - poor sensor contact or degradation, P/S ratio (1.28) > 1.15 - polarizer may be inverted

d.reason: Wide FWHM (68.6nm) - poor sensor contact or degradation
